creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
And we still get this after the patch is applied. This is under LLVM 17.

ld: error: undefined reference due to --no-allow-shlib-undefined: initialize_error_table_r
>>> referenced by ./.libs/libwind.so

ld: error: undefined reference due to --no-allow-shlib-undefined: init_error_table
>>> referenced by ./.libs/libwind.so
